inputs.fcf_source: Marvin floor: normalized software owner cash excluding BTC fair-value marks
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 operating cash flow $67.2M on 256.5M weighted-average shares ≈ $0.26/sh; base uses $0.65/sh for cloud subscription run-rate [Assumption]. BTC marks excluded from Lawrence software path.

blended_best.notes: Normalized subscription owner cash; refresh computes return

optionality_gate.notes: Software cash is not a dhando floor at spot price; levered BTC look-through drives overlay scenarios. mNAV premium at ~$390 vs ~$150/sh filing look-through [Inference].

segments_or_options.label: Bitcoin treasury (fair value)
segments_or_options.notes: Primary asset; marks flow through operating income under ASU 2023-08

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Current BTC spot vs Q1 measurement date for mark-to-market overlay

segments.label: Enterprise analytics software (Strategy)
segments.evidence: FY2025 revenue $463.5M; RPO $588M (10-K); cloud mix shift

options.label: Continued BTC purchases via equity/preferred issuance
options.base_terminal_rationale: Modeled via yield-curve look-through payoff, not separate terminal row

bear.notes: BTC −35% from Q1 marks; dilution from converts/preferred; mNAV compresses toward 1.0×

base.notes: BTC +6%/yr; modest stacking; mNAV premium narrows but positive

lines.label: BTC fair value net of debt/preferred (look-through)
lines.math: Q1 equity $36.7B / 330.8M sh = $110.8; overlay adds BTC appreciation + stacking to $150/sh today [Inference]

lines.label: Premium compression / dilution offset
lines.math: Year-7 payoff $520/sh vs price $390 — BTC path + partial premium retention

sotp_build.notes: Look-through equity; not GAAP book floor

bull.notes: BTC cycle re-rating + sustained premium; convert stack refinanced favorably

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.answer: No — BTC marked to fair value under ASU 2023-08

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.answer: Partial — software profitable; marks dominate GAAP

option_scan.question: Private / illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: 10-K segment note — enterprise software + digital assets only
